text_raw: Damn... we barely escaped with our lives!
text_clean: Damn... we barely escaped with our lives!

text_raw: Soulmen only knows, but the marquis won't let this go unanswered.
text_clean: Soulmen only knows, but the marquis won't let this go unanswered.

text_raw: All we could do was run! They were too strong!
text_clean: All we could do was run! They were too strong!

text_raw: What are they doing at Fort Anvil?

text_raw: How are we supposed to drive them out?
text_clean: How are we supposed to drive them out?

text_raw: Bloody hell! To be beaten this soundly...

text_raw: Oi! Everyone still breathing? Anyone left standing?!
